## Description

Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed.

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change fixing an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change adding functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that breaks existing behavior)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes)

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines (black, ruff, isort)
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix/feature works
- [ ] New and existing tests pass locally (`make test`)
- [ ] I have updated the documentation (README, CHANGELOG, etc.)
- [ ] I have updated the API docs if changing endpoint behavior
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings

## How Has This Been Tested?

Describe the tests you ran and the results.

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the PR here (screenshots, design decisions, etc.).
